hero.title: LeiMall - AI-Powered Global Cross-Border E-Commerce SaaS Platform
hero.subtitle: Build independent site in 3 minutes · AI full-stack operation · Sell to 200+ countries and regions
hero.governmentBar: ✦ Key Project of Chenggong Digital Town ✦ China-Laos Railway Logistics Corridor ✦ South & Southeast Asia Hub

about.title: Global Infrastructure for SMEs to Go Global
about.description1: LeiMall (leixos.com) is China's leading AI-powered cross-border e-commerce multi-tenant SaaS platform. As a key project of Kunming Chenggong Digital Town, we are committed to providing low-cost, efficient, intelligent one-stop global solutions for SMEs worldwide.
about.description2: With a plug-in microservice architecture and prepaid fund management system, we integrate global mainstream payment, logistics, and marketing resources, deeply adapting to core markets like Southeast Asia, Europe, America, and the Middle East. Leveraging Yunnan's geographical advantage as South & Southeast Asia hub and China-Laos Railway logistics corridor, we have created industry-leading Southeast Asia-specific solutions to help Chinese enterprises, especially Yunnan local enterprises, rapidly explore global markets.

features.title: Five Core Advantages, Redefining Global Expansion
features.subtitle: Technology innovation + Global layout + Regional deepening, creating differentiated competitive advantages

plugins.title: Plug-in Extensible Ecosystem
plugins.description: Basic features free forever, advanced features on-demand subscription, continuous iteration, meeting enterprise needs at different stages
